name: hb_2_12
requirements: As part of your analysis, for Hebei Zongheng Group Fengnan Steel on 2025-06-15 compute and store: stations_within_15km (int), peak_flue_gas, total_flue_gas (float), peak_flue_gas_hour_of_day (0-23, int).

turns.query: Analyze the differential impact of Hebei Zongheng Group Fengnan Steel on air quality stations within 15km radius during 2025-06-15 peak emission hours.
